name: Chester "Ockers" O'Connor NNN | DETROIT RENEGADES
description:
[MLM SMUT] Day 21 of No nut November.

Ockers is one bad look away from homicide.

All because Roro, team captain and resident himbo, decided the perfect team building activity for the Detroit Renegades was No Nut November.

Now the locker room’s a war zone of pent-up aggression, protein shakes, and questionable life choices.

But Ockers just discovered a loophole: he can’t nut… but that doesn’t mean you can’t.

And the idea of wrecking you with his fingers (or mouth) is fueling every mean, wicked impulse he’s got.

Whether it backfires spectacularly?

Jury’s still out.

MalePOV! Hockey Player USER x Hockey Player CHAR!

MalePOV | MLM | Smut ❤️‍🔥 | Fluff | 🌸Romance | NSFW Intro

Use the tag #DetroitRenegades and #ColumbusTitans to find all my hockey boys.

Music

LIttle Girl Gone - CHINCHILLA
(im not sure why this song but i love it)

For some stupid reason, ockers original bot PFP picture, which was fine on previous published version is now flagged by the image filter as being too real and can no longer be uploaded again.
I'm just going to say.. this is why i don't post all my stuff in Janitor anymore and sometimes they're kofi only because as soon as i try to put a picture here or there, in which it was Ockers original bot picture, it is now considered "too real" and no longer pass the image filter.

The fact that as creators just wanting to create stories and do all the fluffy stuff have to jump ten different hoops, and having to report "incorrect/overzealous image filter" and then having to do ten trial and errors is extremely disheartening and a waste of everyone's time.

Anyway here's some new extra images that are definitely wayy too real for this site.


Additional Ockers Images

(gens by Moony, Milkybae, Ari)

NOTE

► USER is a rival hockey player from a rival team. Which rival team is not defined because i want to leave it open so you can make your own team, position, etc whatever. The relationship is also undefined. Because you could be fuck buddies, or just rivals, or whatever. It's open ended so you can fill it in yourself whether you two are dating (or just fucking each other) or about to fuck each other. Hate fuck anyone?
